name: anvil
description: Local-first project-state engine for coordinating humans and AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first project-state engine for humans and AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Anvil turns PRDs into reviewed, lockable, evidence-backed work packets that humans and AI agents can coordinate on without conflicts. State is event-sourced in SQLite under .anvil/. Exposes a single-mutator CLI and a 24-tool FastMCP stdio server.
